tripOverview.intro: London captivates with its perfect blend of historic grandeur and modern vibrancy, from royal palaces to bustling markets. This cosmopolitan city offers world-class cuisine, romantic riverside walks, and an incredibly welcoming LGBTQ+ scene.
tripOverview.vibe: A whirlwind romantic adventure through London's iconic sights, vibrant markets, and cozy vegetarian haunts.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers mild spring weather with blooming flowers and fewer crowds

attractions.name: Tower of London
attractions.desc: Historic fortress housing the Crown Jewels and centuries of royal history.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum with artifacts from ancient civilizations.

attractions.name: Borough Market
attractions.desc: London's oldest food market with artisanal produce and street food.

attractions.name: Westminster Abbey
attractions.desc: Gothic abbey where British royals are crowned and buried.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and river services with contactless payment. Black cabs are iconic but expensive, while Uber operates widely throughout the city. Walking is often fastest for short distances in central London.
destinationOverview.tip: Get an Oyster Card or use contactless payment for seamless tube travel, and always stand right on escalators.
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe with excellent emergency services and well-lit streets.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans covering the UK for maps, translations, and sharing memories.

days.intro: Begin your London adventure exploring the city's medieval heart and iconic landmarks.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Discover royal history and the Crown Jewels at this UNESCO World Heritage site.

afternoon.name: Borough Market
afternoon.desc: Explore London's most famous food market with incredible vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Thames Walk to Tower Bridge
afternoon.desc: Romantic riverside stroll with stunning views of London's skyline.

evening.name: Dinner at Dishoom
evening.desc: Exceptional Indian cuisine in a beautiful Bombay café setting.

days.tip: Book Tower of London tickets online to skip queues, and arrive at Borough Market early for the best selection.

days.intro: Immerse yourself in London's cultural treasures and vibrant food scene.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Marvel at world-famous artifacts including the Rosetta Stone and Egyptian mummies.

afternoon.name: Covent Garden Market
afternoon.desc: Browse artisan shops and enjoy street performances in this historic market.

afternoon.name: National Gallery
afternoon.desc: Admire masterpieces by Van Gogh, Da Vinci, and other renowned artists.

evening.name: Soho Evening Stroll
evening.desc: Explore London's vibrant LGBTQ+ district with its bars and cafés.

days.tip: The British Museum is vast - focus on specific galleries to avoid overwhelm, and book dinner reservations early.

days.intro: Experience London's royal heritage and beautiful gardens on this romantic day out.

morning.name: Kew Gardens
morning.desc: Wander through stunning botanical gardens and Victorian glasshouses.

afternoon.name: Westminster Abbey
afternoon.desc: Tour the coronation church of British monarchs with its Gothic architecture.

afternoon.name: St. James's Park
afternoon.desc: Romantic lakeside walk with views of Buckingham Palace.

evening.name: West End Show
evening.desc: Experience world-class theater in London's famous entertainment district.

days.tip: Book West End show tickets in advance, and consider the matinee for better prices and availability.

days.intro: Savor your final day with shopping, markets, and memorable dining experiences.

morning.name: Camden Market
morning.desc: Browse eclectic stalls for unique souvenirs and vintage finds.

afternoon.name: Regent's Park
afternoon.desc: Peaceful park stroll before your departure, perfect for reflection.

afternoon.name: Shopping at Oxford Street
afternoon.desc: Last-minute shopping at London's premier retail destination.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner
evening.desc: Celebrate your London adventure with an exceptional final meal.

days.tip: Pack light souvenirs and confirm your flight departure time for a stress-free final day.

food.intro: London's food scene brilliantly accommodates vegetarian diets with innovative restaurants and diverse international cuisine.
food.tip: Many pubs offer excellent vegetarian options, and always check if service charge is included in your bill.

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location near theaters and restaurants

neighborhoods.name: Soho
neighborhoods.desc: Vibrant nightlife and LGBTQ+ friendly area

midRange.name: The Z Hotel Piccadilly
midRange.vibe: Stylish compact rooms in prime location

midRange.name: Hub by Premier Inn London Covent Garden

hotels.tip: Book accommodations near tube stations for easy transport, and consider neighborhoods like Soho for LGBTQ+ friendly venues.

getYourGuide.name: London Eye Fast Track
getYourGuide.desc: Skip the lines for panoramic city views from the iconic observation wheel.

getYourGuide.name: Harry Potter Studio Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Magical behind-the-scenes experience at the film studios north of London.

getYourGuide.name: Windsor Castle Day Trip
getYourGuide.desc: Visit the Queen's weekend residence with its stunning State Apartments.

hiddenGems.name: Little Venice
hiddenGems.desc: Picturesque canal area perfect for romantic boat rides and waterside cafés.

hiddenGems.name: God's Own Junkyard
hiddenGems.desc: Neon wonderland gallery showcasing vintage signs and electric art installations.

hiddenGems.name: Leake Street Tunnel
hiddenGems.desc: Legal graffiti tunnel under Waterloo Station featuring ever-changing street art.

packing.title: April London Packing
packing.intro: April brings mild spring weather with occasional showers, so pack layers and waterproof items.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase with a small day bag works perfectly for this short city break.
packing.tip: London's weather can be unpredictable, so always carry a compact umbrella and dress in layers.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to London typically range from $600-$900 per person in April.
